intro: Dive into the capabilities of KubeDB with this comprehensive Solution Brief designed for SUSE Rancher environments. Discover how KubeDB offers a robust, multi-tenant cloud-native data protection platform, tailored for enterprises and service providers managing cloud-native applications across diverse environments.

benefits.title: Key Benefits of the Solution Brief

items.name: Multi-Cluster and Multi-Cloud Data Protection
items.description: Experience centralized data protection strategies that span private clouds, public clouds, and edge environments ensuring consistent operations across all your SUSE Rancher deployments.

items.name: Advanced Security and Ransomware Protection
items.description: Benefit from immutable backups and advanced security measures to protect against data loss and ransomware threats.

items.name: Granular Recovery and Migration Capabilities
items.description: Utilize detailed recovery options and seamless migration capabilities for virtual machines and container applications, promoting operational efficiency and minimizing downtime.

items.name: Flexible Deployment Options
items.description: Choose between SaaS or self-hosted solutions to best meet your specific business requirements.

closing: This Solution Brief is ideal for those looking to enhance their data protection and operational efficiencies in SUSE Rancher environments.
